title: Synchronizing Appointments including their duration

posts.author: thebroggi (Random Name)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there

Currently when one synchronizes a task from monday.com to his calendar the calendar will simply show an entry but not from when til when this task will be done and also there is no duration.

Basically the synchronization of tasks to google calendar is useless, for now.

I would love to see a feature in monday.com to sync tasks withthe releant time frame and duration.

VOTE FOR THIS FEATURE - If you want to fully integrate monday in your calendar and vice versa!
